variables.name: Variables & Data Types
variables.description: Fundamental units of storage: integers, floats, strings, booleans. Covers declaration, assignment, and type coercion.

arrays.name: Arrays
arrays.description: Contiguous memory blocks storing homogeneous elements, supporting O(1) random access and O(n) insertion/deletion.

strings.name: Strings & String Manipulation
strings.description: Immutable sequences of characters; sliding window, two-pointer, and hashing techniques for string problems.

hash_tables.name: Hash Tables
hash_tables.description: Key-value store using a hash function for O(1) average lookup, insert, and delete. Collision resolution strategies.

sorting.name: Sorting Algorithms
sorting.description: Bubble, selection, insertion (O(n²)); merge sort, quicksort, heapsort (O(n log n)); counting/radix sort (O(n+k)).

binary_search.name: Binary Search
binary_search.description: O(log n) search on sorted arrays; template variations for lower-bound, upper-bound, and search in rotated arrays.

recursion.name: Recursion
recursion.description: A function calling itself with a smaller subproblem; base cases, call stack, and tail recursion optimization.

linked_lists.name: Linked Lists
linked_lists.description: Singly and doubly linked nodes with pointer manipulation; reversal, cycle detection (Floyd's algorithm), and merging.

stacks_queues.name: Stacks & Queues
stacks_queues.description: LIFO and FIFO abstractions; applications in expression parsing, BFS, monotonic stack problems.

trees.name: Trees & Binary Trees
trees.description: Hierarchical structures; DFS traversals (pre/in/post-order), BFS level-order, height, diameter, LCA.

bst.name: Binary Search Trees
bst.description: Trees maintaining BST property; search, insert, delete in O(h); AVL and Red-Black tree balancing concepts.

heaps.name: Heaps & Priority Queues
heaps.description: Max-heap and min-heap; heapify O(n), extract-min O(log n); applications in k-th largest, Dijkstra, median streams.

tries.name: Tries (Prefix Trees)
tries.description: Character-indexed tree for prefix matching; O(L) insert and search; applications in autocomplete and IP routing.

graphs.name: Graphs: Representation & Traversal
graphs.description: Adjacency list/matrix; BFS (shortest path in unweighted), DFS (connected components, topological sort).

backtracking.name: Backtracking
backtracking.description: Systematic exhaustive search with pruning; N-queens, permutations, subsets, Sudoku solver.

dynamic_programming_1d.name: Dynamic Programming (1D)
dynamic_programming_1d.description: Memoization and tabulation for 1D state spaces; Fibonacci, climbing stairs, house robber, coin change.

dynamic_programming_2d.name: Dynamic Programming (2D)
dynamic_programming_2d.description: Grid DP, LCS, LIS, edit distance, knapsack; state transition on 2D tables.

graph_algorithms.name: Graph Algorithms
graph_algorithms.description: Dijkstra (SSSP), Bellman-Ford, Floyd-Warshall, Prim/Kruskal MST, Union-Find, cycle detection.

sliding_window.name: Sliding Window & Two Pointers
sliding_window.description: Linear-time patterns for subarray/substring problems; fixed and variable window, fast-slow pointers.

bit_manipulation.name: Bit Manipulation
bit_manipulation.description: AND, OR, XOR, shifts; common tricks — power of two, single number, bit counting, bitmask DP.
